description: FR-40 doneness-is-exit-code-only (end-to-end regression for a Council finding): a wrapped command that PRINTS a terminal keyword ('build FAILED: 3 tests failed') but EXITS 0 must be reaped COMPLETED. The engine detects terminals by the heartbeat status FIELD, never by substring-scanning the adapter's free-text output label.

worker_cmd: print('build FAILED: 3 tests failed'); import sys; sys.exit(0)
